metadata.title: TuringRAG
metadata.description: Knowledge bases and chat — Q&A grounded in your documents

home.heroTitle: Answers grounded in your own documents
home.heroSubtitle: Upload PDF, Word, Markdown, and more. Build knowledge bases and ask questions in natural language—with citations when it matters.
home.feature1Body: Organize content by topic. Common office and text formats are parsed and indexed automatically.
home.feature2Body: Retrieval plus generation, with references to source passages so you can verify important details.
home.feature3Body: Keep asking in the same session. Replies stay tied to your materials, not generic web knowledge.
home.step1Body: Set up a library per topic with a clear name and description for easy management.
home.step2Body: Files are processed in the background. Wait until indexing finishes for the best answers.
home.step3Body: Ask in everyday language. For decisions that matter, always confirm against the original files.
home.ctaBody: Create an account and set up your first knowledge base.

auth.registerSubtitle: Create your account to get started
auth.noAccount: Don't have an account? Create one now
auth.haveAccount: Already have an account? Sign in

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
validation.passwordLength: Password must be at least 8 characters long
validation.passwordUpper: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter
validation.passwordLower: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter
validation.passwordNumber: Password must contain at least one number

rag.title: RAG Pipeline
rag.description: Interactive view of how documents are ingested, indexed, retrieved, and turned into grounded answers in the backend.

toolbar.dragHint: Drag any step to reposition. Steps are grouped by swimlane.

summaries.ingestion: Upload files, optionally preview chunks, then process in the background: split text, embed, and store in MinIO, PostgreSQL, and Chroma or Qdrant.
summaries.chat: User messages trigger LangChain history-aware retrieval over kb_ID collections, then a stuff-documents chain streams the LLM reply with citations.
summaries.retrieval: Test retrieval and the Open API query endpoint run similarity search without calling the LLM.

preview.title: Preview chunks
preview.subtitle: POST .../documents/preview
preview.detail: LangChain loaders + RecursiveCharacterTextSplitter; no DB write

pollTasks.title: Poll task status
pollTasks.subtitle: GET .../documents/tasks
pollTasks.detail: Frontend polls until completed or failed

loadSplit.title: Load and split
loadSplit.subtitle: process_document_background
loadSplit.detail: PDF, DOCX, MD, TXT via LangChain loaders

vectorStore.title: Vector store
vectorStore.subtitle: VectorStoreFactory.create
vectorStore.detail: Collection kb_ID (prefix kb_ + knowledge base id); Chroma or Qdrant

home.heroSubtitle: Your personal AI-powered knowledge hub. Upload documents, create knowledge bases, and get instant answers through natural conversations.
home.actionCreateKbDesc: Build a new AI-powered knowledge repository
home.actionUploadDesc: Add PDF, DOCX, MD or TXT files to your knowledge bases
home.actionChatDesc: Get instant answers from your knowledge with AI
home.step1Body: Start by creating a new knowledge base to organize your information. Give it a name and description that helps you identify its purpose.
home.step2Body: Upload PDF, DOCX, MD or TXT files to your knowledge base. Our system will process and index them for AI-powered retrieval.
home.step3Body: Start a conversation with your knowledge base. Ask questions in natural language and get accurate answers based on your documents.
